pattern: Bob's fixed path to the root stamps each visited node with an arrival time, then a depth-first walk from the root credits Alice the full, half, or none of each gate depending on who arrives first, maximizing the leaf total.
hints: Bob's route is forced: it is the unique path from his node up to the root, so record when he reaches each node.
Alice starts at the root and explores; at any node, compare her depth to Bob's arrival time to decide if she pays full, splits, or pays nothing.
First find Bob's path and assign each node his arrival time (infinity if he never visits), then DFS from the root accumulating income and taking the best value reached at a leaf.

edge_inputs.description: two nodes, Alice and Bob swap ends
Bob reaches root before Alice descends far, so no sharing
Alice must pick the more profitable of two leaves
every gate is a cost, choose the least negative leaf
deeper tree where sharing happens mid-path

stress.description: random tree built by attaching each new node to an existing one
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(2, size)
    edges = []
    for v in range(1, n):
        u = rng.randint(0, v - 1)
        edges.append([u, v])
    bob = rng.randint(1, n - 1)
    amount = [rng.randrange(-10000, 10001, 2) for _ in range(n)]
    return [edges, bob, amount]
stress.note: amounts kept even per the problem; bob is any non-root node

oracle_python:
class Solution:
    def mostProfitablePath(self, edges, bob, amount):
        n = len(amount)
        g = [[] for _ in range(n)]
        for a, b in edges:
            g[a].append(b)
            g[b].append(a)
        parent = [-1] * n
        order = []
        seen = [False] * n
        stack = [0]
        seen[0] = True
        while stack:
            u = stack.pop()
            order.append(u)
            for w in g[u]:
                if not seen[w]:
                    seen[w] = True
                    parent[w] = u
                    stack.append(w)
        bob_time = [float('inf')] * n
        t = 0
        cur = bob
        while cur != -1:
            bob_time[cur] = t
            t += 1
            cur = parent[cur]
        best = [float('-inf')]
        def dfs(u, p, depth, income):
            if bob_time[u] == depth:
                income += amount[u] // 2
            elif depth < bob_time[u]:
                income += amount[u]
            is_leaf = True
            for w in g[u]:
                if w != p:
                    is_leaf = False
                    dfs(w, u, depth + 1, income)
            if is_leaf:
                best[0] = max(best[0], income)
        import sys
        sys.setrecursionlimit(300000)
        dfs(0, -1, 0, 0)
        return best[0]
